theme: pack seeds on a growing sunflower
title: Beyond the Golden Angle: A Boundary-Aware Divergence Schedule
strategies: trivial: constant angular step 360/N ('spokes'), ignores the growth law entirely
greedy: the textbook constant golden angle 137.50776..., asymptotically near-optimal but blind to the finite growth-law transition and disk boundary

strong: decompose into golden-angle bulk + a boundary-aware coordinate-descent correction over the scored rim window, evaluated against the real rim Voronoi-uniformity objective so every accepted move is a verified improvement

other viable ideas: detect the bulk/rim growth-law transition from the input and re-derive a locally-appropriate divergence step there; simulated-annealing over the whole schedule; sequential maximin deposition using the known future radius sequence
